title: Section 18
content: (1) The constitution of the Anjuman (Court) and the term of office of its members shall be prescribed by the Statutes. (2) Subject to the provisions of this Act, the Anjuman (Court) shall have the following powers and functions, namely:-- (a) to review, from time to time, the broad policies and programmes of the University and to suggest measures for the improvement and development of the University; (b) to consider and pass resolutions on the annual report and the annual accounts of the University and the audit report on such accounts; (c) to advise the Visitor in respect of any matter which may be referred to it for advice; and (d) to perform such other functions as may be prescribed by this Act or Statutes.
